Natrum Carbonicum.personality: A deeply sensitive, nervous, and exhausted individual who is chilly, stoop-shouldered, and physically weak. They are profoundly affected by their environment—unable to tolerate extremes of heat or cold, drafts, weather changes, or even minor sensory stimuli like the rustling of paper or the slam of a door.
Natrum Carbonicum.mental_state: Marked mental fatigue and brain fag; loses the ability to concentrate, forgets what was just read, and cannot hold a thought from the beginning to the end of a sentence. Confusion of mind follows any mental exertion, rendering sustained intellectual work impossible, with progressive deterioration of memory and cognitive function.
Natrum Carbonicum.emotional_pattern: Estranged from family, friends, and society, feeling a deep division between themselves and others, with aversion to both relatives and strangers. Music provokes intense melancholy, weeping, and even suicidal tendencies; the overall emotional state is one of anxious trepidation, irritability, and a fragile nervousness that can escalate into religious insanity.
